custom_css: aside .btn-pulse{background:linear-gradient(45deg,#ff85a2,#ff477e) !important;color:white !important;border-radius:15px !important;font-weight:900 !important;text-transform:uppercase !important;font-style:italic !important;box-shadow:0 0 15px rgba(255,133,162,0.5) !important;animation:pulse-mae 1.5s infinite !important}@keyframes pulse-mae{0%{transform:scale(1);box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(255,133,162,0.7)}70%{transform:scale(1.05);box-shadow:0 0 0 10px rgba(255,133,162,0)}100%{transform:scale(1);box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(255,133,162,0)}}.title-3d{font-weight:900 !important;font-style:italic !important;text-transform:uppercase !important;color:#fff !important;text-shadow:0 1px 0 #ccc,0 2px 0 #c9c9c9,0 3px 0 #bbb,0 4px 0 #b9b9b9,0 5px 0 #aaa,0 6px 1px rgba(0,0,0,.1),0 0 5px rgba(0,0,0,.1),0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.3),0 3px 5px rgba(0,0,0,.2),0 5px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.25) !important}#streak-input{background-color:#2d1b1e !important;border:1px solid #ff85a2 !important;border-radius:12px !important;color:white !important}.item-card{background-color:#fff5f7 !important;border-radius:12px !important;border:2px solid transparent !important}.item-card.selected-card{border-color:#ff477e !important}.tab-btn{font-weight:800 !important;text-transform:uppercase !important;color:#ff85a2 !important}.tab-btn.active{color:#ff477e !important}.tab-btn.active::after{background-color:#ff477e !important;height:3px !important}
